title: Game
description: A single Foresight Packing Challenge run in which an autonomous agent places boxes into a fixed truck volume. A game progresses through start, repeated place, and stop, with a packing density score reported on completion.

game_id.description: Server-assigned identifier for the game run.

mode.description: Execution mode. dev is unlimited and physics-free, compete is rate-limited with full physics, private_eval is the closed evaluation phase.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the game.

density.description: Fraction of usable truck volume filled with boxes.

boxes_placed.description: Number of boxes successfully placed so far.

total_boxes.description: Total number of boxes in the original sequence.

termination_reason.description: Reason the game ended, when applicable.
